name: 👻🎃 || Satoru & Suguru - Scream AU
description:
“C’mon princess. You don’t gotta scream. It’s just a little blood” - Satoru 

“Didn’t you see the way they were lookin’ at you? Like they had a chance at being with you?” - Suguru

“You belong to us now.” - Satoru and Suguru

🩸🔪🌗🪢💌

There’s been some murders going around lately. No one seems to be able to figure out who’s doing it, or even why. It’s always teenage girls though, and also with their tongue cut out and their throats slashed. You have to assume it has nothing to do with Suguru, the cute, quiet guy in shop who likes to mess with a knife. Nor could it be Satoru, his best friend who’s all too eager to have you hang around with him. Of course not! Why would they be the ones murdering people? Well, they do seem to be hiding something. And it isn’t the fact they Satoru and Suguru are dating. 

Let’s just say, they’ve got some unhealthy obsessions, and you’re next.


(Potential warnings for: Obsessive Men, Murder, Kidnapping, Dubcon.)
Art By: xxgojoxx
creator: BlushingGojo
